title: Bloodhounds of Broadway
writer: Sy Gomberg, Albert Mannheimer, Damon Runyon
actors: Mitzi Gaynor, Scott Brady, Mitzi Green
plot: A calculating New York bookie hires a talented singer and dancer to entertain his nightclub. She brings her pet bloodhounds with her. This makes his girlfriend jealous, so she considers spilling the beans on his dealings to the feds.
